roles.name: Washerwoman
roles.description: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Townsfolk.

roles.name: Librarian
roles.description: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Outsider.(Or that zero are in play.)

roles.name: Investigator
roles.description: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Minion.

roles.name: Chef
roles.description: You start knowing how many pairs of evil players there are.

roles.name: Empath
roles.description: Each night, you learn how many of your 2 alive neighbors are evil.

roles.name: Fortune Teller
roles.description: Each night, choose 2 players: you learn if either is a Demon. There is a good player that registers as a Demon to you

roles.name: Undertaker
roles.description: Each night*, you learn which character died by execution today.

roles.name: Monk
roles.description: Each night*, choose a player(not yourself): they are safe from the Demon tonight.

roles.name: Ravenkeeper
roles.description: If you die at night, you are woken to choose a player: you learn their character.

roles.name: Virgin
roles.description: The 1st time you are nominated, if the nominator is a Townsflk, they are executed immediately.

roles.name: Slayer
roles.description: Once per game, during the day, publicly choose a player: if they are the Demon, they die.

roles.name: Soldier
roles.description: You are safe from the Demon.

roles.name: Mayor
roles.description: If only 3 players live & no execution occurs, your team wins. If you die at night, another player might die instead.

roles.name: Butler
roles.description: Each night, choose a player (not yourself): tomorrow, you may only vote if they are voting too.

roles.name: Drunk
roles.description: You do not know you are the Drunk. You think you are a Townfolk character, but you are not.

roles.name: Recluse
roles.description: You might register as evil & as a Minion or Demon, even if dead,

roles.name: Saint
roles.description: If you die by execution, your team loses.

roles.name: Poisoner
roles.description: Each night, choose a player: they are poisoned tonight and tomorrow day.

roles.name: Spy
roles.description: Each night, you see the Grimoire. You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider, even if dead.

roles.name: Baron
roles.description: There are extra Outsiders in play. [+2 Outsiders]

roles.name: Scarlet Woman
roles.description: If there are 5 or more players alive & the Demon dies, you become the Demon. (Travellers don't count.)

roles.name: Imp
roles.description: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you kill yourself this way, a Minion becomes the Imp.
